role_title: Senior Associate, Marketplace - Restaurant Growth Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: unclear — hybrid model balancing in-person collaboration with remote work

level_signals: 3+ years of experience in a problem-solving role (consulting, tech, banking)

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 3+ years of experience in a problem-solving role (consulting, tech, banking).
You have an extreme sense of ownership — you never shy away from tackling ambiguous problems and can motivate teammates to go above and beyond.
You solve problems from first principles and resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You thrive with a diverse set of responsibilities and love working across teams and disciplines.
You're an analytical powerhouse — you let data win arguments and are comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and modeling in Excel.
You're a collaborator with experience managing stakeholders across diverse audiences, from front-line doers to senior executives.

scope.surface: US Marketplace Strategy & Operations — Restaurant Growth (selection, merchandising, merchant partnerships, product commercialization)
core_responsibilities: Growing restaurant marketplace by launching new selection
Commercializing products that help restaurant partners grow on DoorDash
Identifying and executing the most promising ways to grow marketplace revenue
Deepening DoorDash's partnership with restaurant partners
Running a sustainable marketplace business creating value for merchants, Dashers, and consumers

green_flags: Comprehensive benefits package described in detail (401k match, 16 weeks parental leave, medical/dental/vision, etc.)
Clear team mandate and role scope described
High-visibility role with direct ownership of top-line and bottom-line metrics
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not addressed in the JD
No specific cities listed for hybrid work; unclear which offices require in-person presence
Hybrid model described only as 'balancing in-person collaboration with remote work' — no concrete office time percentage stated
No nice-to-haves listed, making it harder to gauge where the bar is set

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', years required, and comp range)

location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from mention of 'remote jobs associated with office in NYC' in legal notice and hybrid model language)

ambiguities: Hybrid model is mentioned but no office time percentage or specific cities for the role are given — only that a national pay range applies including Illinois and Colorado, suggesting some remote-eligible posture.
Visa sponsorship is neither confirmed nor denied anywhere in the JD.
